problem id: c2dacc5b
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  01011010 -> 10001101
  11011100 -> 10101110
  10010010 -> 01101001
  10100100 -> 00010010
  01101011 -> 10000101
  01100001 -> 00100000
  10101010 -> 11110101
  00001001 -> 10010100

query: 01001010
predicted answer: 10000101
